---
title: 'Resources: Autism, ADHD, & Mental Health'
date: '2023-09-08T18:53:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'The Freedom Center'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '6083553539127877991'
blogger_filename: '/p/resources-autism-adhd-mental-health.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Freedom Center/feed.atom'
---

<h2 style="text-align: left;"><span style="color: white;">&nbsp;Resources: Autism, ADHD, &amp; Mental Health</span></h2><h3 style="text-align: left;">Definitions:</h3><h4 style="text-align: left;">ASD, ADHD, AuDHD</h4><p style="text-align: left;"></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-autism-spectrum-disorder-asd.html" target="_blank">Define: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD)</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-attention-deficithyperactivity.html" target="_blank">Define: Attention-Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD)</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-audhd-asdadhd.html" target="_blank">Define: AuDHD (ASD+ADHD)</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-pathological-demand-avoidance-pda.html" target="_blank">Define: Pathological Demand Avoidance (PDA)</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-ehlers-danlos-syndromes-eds.html" target="_blank">Define: Ehlers-Danlos Syndromes (EDS), Hypermobility, and Neurodiversity</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/expand-conditions-overlapping-with-adhd.html" target="_blank">Expand: Conditions Overlapping with ADHD and/or Autism</a></li></ul><h4 style="text-align: left;">Counseling Terms</h4><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-grief.html" target="_blank">Define: Grief</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-post-traumatic-stress-disorder.html" target="_blank">Define: Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD)</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-addiction.html" target="_blank">Define: Addiction</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-codependency.html" target="_blank">Define: Codependency</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-boundaries.html" target="_blank">Define: Boundaries</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-cognitive-behavioral-therapy-cbt.html" target="_blank">Define: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-integration-clinical-perspective.html" target="_blank">Define: Integration (Clinical Perspective)</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-somatic-emotional-storage.html" target="_blank">Define: Somatic Emotional Storage (The Emotions Stored in the Body)</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-narcissistic-abuse.html" target="_blank">Define: Narcissistic Abuse</a></li><li><a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/2023/09/define-religious-ptsd-post-traumatic.html" target="_blank">Define: Religious PTSD (Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder)</a></li></ul><div><br /></div><h3 style="text-align: left;">Links to Resources:</h3><h3 style="text-align: left;">Neurodiversity/Neurodivergents&nbsp;</h3><div><h4>Attention-Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD)</h4><p></p><ul><li><b>Dr. Russell Barkley &lt; A leading voice in ADHD Research</b></li><ul><li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/@russellbarkleyphd2023/playlists" target="_blank">YouTube Home Page</a></li><li>ADHD:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.russellbarkley.org/factsheets.html" target="_blank">Fact Sheets</a></li><li><a href="https://youtu.be/YSfCdBBqNXY?si=z_FzYg7RKzChIi2S" target="_blank">ADHD: Essential Ideas for Parents - Dr. Russell Barkely</a></li><li>Dr Russell Barkley on<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LnS0PfNyj4U" target="_blank">&nbsp;ADHD Meds and how they all work differently</a>&nbsp;from each other</li><li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eSmfEz93KhE" target="_blank">ADHD Medications -- Part V Choosing Medications</a></li><li><a href="http://adhdmedicationguide.com/pdf/adhd_med_guide_091723.pdf" target="_blank">ADHD Medication Guide</a>&nbsp;- PDF</li></ul></ul><ul><li>ADHDtips:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/@ADHDtips1" target="_blank">YouTube Channel</a></li></ul><ul><li>Children and Adults with Attention-Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder (CHADD)</li><ul><li><a href="https://chadd.org/about-adhd/overview/" target="_blank">About ADHD Fact Sheet</a></li></ul></ul><ul><li>How to ADHD on&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/@HowtoADHD/playlists" target="_blank">YouTube</a></li><ul><li>Important Video:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OM0Xv0eVGtY" target="_blank">ADHD and Motivation</a></li></ul></ul><ul><li>Rick Green:</li><ul><li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K2RKNVpnK2o" target="_blank">ADHD in Adults. Yes, it’s real. Yes, you can do something about it. | Rick Green and Dr. Ahmed</a></li></ul><li><a href="https://fb.watch/ngxtZIpKe4/" target="_blank">What ADHD feels</a>&nbsp;like, by Lorelai Gilmore</li></ul><div><br /></div></div><h4>Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD)</h4><p></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><a href="https://embrace-autism.com" target="_blank">Embrace Autism</a>&nbsp;The #1 Autism&nbsp; Assessment Website</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>YouTube</li><ul><li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A1AUdaH-EPM" target="_blank">Why everything you know about autism is wrong | Jac den Houting | TEDxMacquarieUniversity</a></li><li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2rxzC4OBaOs" target="_blank">How Adult Autism Goes Undetected</a></li><li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TJuwhCIQQTs" target="_blank">What is Autism? | Quick Learner</a></li><li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rjiJebsPKyU" target="_blank">Signs of Autism in Adults - Autistic Traits You Never Knew Existed</a></li></ul></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Jeremy Andrew Davis (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@jeremyandrewdavis" target="_blank">jeremyandrewdavis</a>) - Skits showing the ways therapists don't get Neurodivergents, and other life stuff.</li><ul><li></li><li><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@jeremyandrewdavis/video/7132113495927147822" target="_blank">Should/Did you get an official diagnosis?&nbsp;</a></li><li></li></ul></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>GenericArtDad (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@genericartdad" target="_blank">genericartdad</a>) -- Pseudo Intellectual, Parent / AuDHD</li><ul><li></li><li><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@genericartdad/video/7257336450713357614" target="_blank">Pathological Demand Avoidance (PDA)</a>&nbsp;</li><li><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@genericartdad/video/7248432619199679787" target="_blank">"Inconclusively Autistic"</a></li><li><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@genericartdad/video/7221342698693741866" target="_blank">De-Masking and Skill Regression</a></li><li><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@genericartdad/video/7198340083295014190" target="_blank">Neurodivergent Culture vs Neurotypical Culture</a></li></ul></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>By MyFavoriteJo "Masking is when normal people (Neurodivergents) CosPlay as someone with Neurotypical Disorder" <i>&lt;She reverses the roles, and calls those Neurodivergents the normal people, and Neurotypicals the ones with a disorder.&gt;</i></li><ul><li><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@myfavouritejo/video/7271446520191307009" target="_blank">Neurotypical should not be the default</a>...</li><li><i><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@myfavouritejo/video/7275193899612736770" style="font-style: normal;" target="_blank">What is Masking?</a></i></li></ul></ul><div><br /></div><h4 style="text-align: left;">ASD, ADHD, AuDHD Tests</h4><div><ul><li>Do you think you might be autistic and/or ADHD? Try the&nbsp;<a href="https://embrace-autism.com/autism-spectrum-quotient/">Autism Spectrum Quotient</a>&nbsp;or the&nbsp;<a href="https://embrace-autism.com/raads-r/">RAADS–R</a>; or the&nbsp;<a href="https://embrace-autism.com/asrs-5/">ASRS-5</a>&nbsp;for ADHD—they are the most widely used and empirically validated tests that can give an indication of whether you might be autistic or AuDHD</li></ul><div><br /></div></div><div><h4>ASD, ADHD, AuDHD Content Creators</h4></div><div>These voices range from experts to laypeople, but they provide helpful information, stories, and perspectives on living with ASD, ADHD, and/or AuDHD.</div><div><br /></div><div><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Darrell's Facebook Page:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100089776621771" target="_blank">ADHD, Autism &amp; Mental Health Memes &amp; Videos, by Wolfe Bookmark</a>&nbsp;- This is a page dedicated to sharing content created for the Neurodivergent community.</li><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/MindBodyandCrystals" target="_blank">Mind Over Matter With Emma ADHD &amp; MH</a> - ADHD mum trying to navigate life &amp; helping you to understand yourself! Humour &amp; honesty </li><li>How to ADHD on <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@HowtoADHD/playlists" target="_blank">YouTube</a></li><li>ADHD_love_</li><ul><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/ADHDlovevids" target="_blank">Facebook</a></li><li><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@ADHD_Love?fbclid=IwAR03glCg-wHpCUXL1g3gWtuAaah5c66lpgBDZMwWK1FJjPRusNci-UN9hE8" target="_blank">TikTok</a></li></ul><li>Mel Robbins: <a href="https://www.melrobbins.com/about-mel" target="_blank">A life coach</a>, who while not specific to Neurodivergents, often produced ADHD related content.</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>TikTok</li><ul><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100085246234948" target="_blank">Connor DeWolfe</a> - Relatable ADHD humour. Mostly. As in, it's 'mostly' humour AND it's mostly ADHD.</li><li>Jeremy Andrew Davis (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@jeremyandrewdavis" target="_blank">jeremyandrewdavis</a>) - Skits showing the ways therapists don't get Neurodivergents, and other life stuff.</li><ul><li><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@jeremyandrewdavis/video/7254374423845801259" target="_blank">Alpha Males vs Beta Males</a></li><li><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@jeremyandrewdavis/video/7154416705177980202" target="_blank">Dopamine Swings</a></li></ul><li>Jo (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@myfavouritejo" target="_blank">myfavouritejo</a>) is a very unique creator, who presents her takes on the world as an Autistic from the perspective: <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@myfavouritejo/video/7275193899612736770" target="_blank">What if Neurodivergency was the default?</a> She calls "typical" or "normal" or "non-Nuerodivergent" folks "Neurotypical Disorder".</li><li>Abbey’s Mom Christine (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@abbeysmom17" target="_blank">abbeysmom17</a>) and&nbsp;Abbey (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@hatsbyabbey" target="_blank">hatsbyabbey</a>)</li><li>Catieosaurus (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@catieosaurus" target="_blank">ADHD</a>, Sex Therapy, and other content)</li><li>DrawingsByTrent - <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@drawingsbytrent" target="_blank">Trent </a>is an autistic artist. Our purpose is to encourage, educate &amp; inspire</li><li>Paige Layle -&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/@realpaigelayle" target="_blank">Autism Advocate</a>&nbsp;and #ActuallyAutistic</li><li>Kaelynn - <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@kaelynn_vp" target="_blank">Autistic Therapist &amp; Advocate</a></li><li>Dr Jessica Myszak Psychologist (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@drjessicamyszak" target="_blank">drjessicamyszak</a>)</li><li>Jordyn's Summer Shirt Project (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@summershirtproject" target="_blank">summershirtproject</a>)</li><li>An Autistic Guide (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@anautisticguide" target="_blank">anautisticguide</a>) - PDA Autistic Therapist + Mom</li><li></li><li>GenericArtDad (<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@genericartdad" target="_blank">genericartdad</a>) -- Pseudo Intellectual, Parent / AuDHD</li></ul></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Movie/TV</li><ul><li><a href="https://www.imdb.com/title/tt1278469/" target="_blank">Temple Grandin (2010)</a></li></ul></ul><div><br /></div></div><h3 style="text-align: left;">Counselors, Therapists, and Theologians&nbsp;</h3><div><br /></div><div>Counselors, Therapists, and Theologians who specialize or speak to living healthy and free.</div><div style="text-align: left;"></div><div style="text-align: left;"><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DrDoyleSays/about" target="_blank">Dr. Glenn Patrick Doyle</a>&nbsp;- at&nbsp;<a href="https://www.realisticlifechange.com/?fbclid=IwAR3E0W_g54b_4s6ZwCwJBcSPbo0_V_aLfLK55sIqtrTyeZzZFtf3ue9OOdQ" target="_blank">Realistic Life Change</a></li><li><a href="https://www.drcloud.com" target="_blank">Dr. Henry Cloud</a> - Boundaries, Life Coach, Spiritual Leadership</li><li><a href="https://drtownsend.com" target="_blank">Dr. John Townsend</a> - Boundaries, Consultant, Psychologist</li><li>Bob Hamp, LMFT and Polly Hamp NLP - Faith and Mental Health. Freedom. Tour guide to the soul. Co-Founder of <a href="https://tdacad.com/about/" target="_blank">Think Differently Academy</a>!</li><ul><li>The <a href="https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLnIIzkbSbhmULFuueFoyftz6iJlQog3ww&amp;si=PJ8SGXbaUq3H7dO7" target="_blank">Foundations of Freedom</a>&nbsp;(&lt;older free version&gt;) is a must for all Freedom seekers.</li><li>Newer/Updated Version (<a href="https://tdacad.com/pricing-plan/?r=3281&amp;wcm_redirect_to=sfwd-courses&amp;wcm_redirect_id=3281" target="_blank">paid here</a>)</li></ul><li>Siang-Yang Tan - <a href="https://www.fuller.edu/faculty/siang-yang-tan/" target="_blank">Fuller </a>Senior Professor Of Psychology, Clinical Psychology Department</li><li><a href="https://timclinton.com" target="_blank">Dr. Tim Clinton</a> - Author of "The New Christian Counselor</li><li><a href="http://idahochristiancounseling.com/index.html" target="_blank">Jana Ross, LMHC</a> -&nbsp;A Christian Counselor to individuals, couples, and families in Greater Coeur d'Alene and North Idaho.</li><li><a href="https://matthiasjbarker.com" target="_blank">Matthias Barker</a> - Moving toward what's meaningful in the midst of hardship.</li><li><a href="https://danielamenmd.com" target="_blank">Daniel Amen, MD</a> - Spec Scans for ADHD</li></ul></div><div><br /></div><h3 style="text-align: left;">Common Counseling Topics</h3><div><i>*Under Construction*</i></div><h4 style="text-align: left;">Relationships, Marriage, and Sex</h4><div><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><a href="https://oneextraordinarymarriage.com" target="_blank">One Extraordinary Marriage</a> - Podcast</li><li><a href="https://fiercemarriage.com" target="_blank">Fierce Marriage</a> - Podcast</li><li>Lauren - <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@the_dadvocate" target="_blank">The_Dadvocate</a>, specializes in helping women understand men.</li></ul></div><h4 style="text-align: left;">Grief &amp; Loss</h4><p></p><p></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Grief</li><ul><li></li><li>Book: <a href="https://www.amazon.com/Where-When-Hurts-Philip-Yancey-dp-0310245729/dp/0310245729/ref=dp_ob_title_bk" target="_blank">Where Is God When It Hurts?</a> by Philip Yancey (Author)</li></ul><li>Widow Grief</li><ul><li><a href="https://widowgriefsucks.blogspot.com/p/start-here_29.html" target="_blank">Grief Sucks (Widow Resources Articles)</a></li></ul></ul><p></p><p><br /></p><h4>Trauma &amp; Tragedy</h4><div><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>PTSD</li><li>Religious PTSD</li></ul></div><p><br /></p><h4 style="text-align: left;">Addiction, Habits, Hang-ups, and Bondage</h4><p></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Narcissistic Abuse</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Addiction</li><ul><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/reel/524297619573650" target="_blank">Addiction meets your needs through counterfeits</a>. The solution isn't to say "it's bad", the solution is find the real valid need and meet it through healthy means. - by <a href="https://www.facebook.com/joshterryplays/reels/" target="_blank">Josh Terry</a></li></ul></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Codependency&nbsp;</li></ul><p></p><p><br /></p><h4 style="text-align: left;">Healing and Healthy Mindsets</h4><p></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Boundaries</li><li>Integration</li><li>Cognitive Behavioral Therapy</li></ul><div><br /></div><div><br /></div>
